_publications._publicationTitle: Metalloproteinase 1 downregulation in neurofibromatosis 1: Therapeutic potential of antimalarial hydroxychloroquine and chloroquine.

_contextSnippet: The mRNA and protein expression of AHR was successfully decreased by transfection with AHR siRNA compared with that with control scrambled siRNA in both HEFs and NFFs
details: Successfully decreased AHR mRNA and protein expression in both HEFs and NFFs
